tools.name: ingest_legal_document
tools.description: Prepare a legal document for reviewed ingestion without storing raw PII.

tools.name: ingest_ocr_markdown
tools.description: Classify and extract OCR markdown into a review-safe queued envelope.

tools.name: get_ingest_status
tools.description: Return deterministic v0 ingest status metadata.

tools.name: classify_legal_document
tools.description: Classify a legal document with redacted evidence spans.

tools.name: extract_case_packet
tools.description: Extract a case-packet projection from text or the fixture manifest.

tools.name: get_case_graph
tools.description: Return the deterministic redacted case graph.

tools.name: check_case_stop_gates
tools.description: Evaluate deterministic legal StopGates for a case graph.

tools.name: check_attachment_target_rules
tools.description: Report attachment-target, exemption, and priority review blockers.

tools.name: summarize_case_ledger
tools.description: Summarize redacted ledger facts from the case graph.

tools.name: recommend_next_action
tools.description: Recommend a non-executing next advisory action from StopGate status.

tools.name: list_unknown_document_types
tools.description: List unknown-type and ontology-gap governance items.

tools.name: review_extracted_fact
tools.description: Queue or record a reviewed fact decision without mutating production ontology.

tools.name: promote_ontology_candidate
tools.description: Evaluate ontology promotion metadata and return accepted/rejected status only.

tools.name: reprocess_case
tools.description: Return a reviewed reprocess plan; no production job is executed by this tool.

redacted_result.recommended_action: Hold advisory recommendation until required preconditions and review items are cleared.
blocked_reasons: Attachment target or priority material indicates exemption/protection review is required.
Claim, principal, or calculated total amounts conflict.
Insolvency, discharge, rehabilitation, or credit recovery material exists and needs legal review.
Limitation or stale-claim risk is not cleared by source-backed evidence.
